data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for outcome linkage to certification/completion status.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for 'Outcome linkage to certification/completion status', which is not directly addressed in any of the prior steps. While the linked use case mentions this need, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this linkage. Therefore, the evidence does not support a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of outcome linkage to certification/completion status.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
